key_threats: 2 wins suggest they have found some form — don't take them lightly in September
Playing late in the season they may be motivated to avoid finishing bottom of the table
key_weaknesses: NRR of -1.88 is among the worst in Group B — their losses are heavy
6 losses from 9 — consistent underperformance throughout the season
By September WW will be in good rhythm — Firehawks face a well-drilled side

counter_strategy.how_to_bowl: Keep it professional — late season game, aim for a comprehensive win to boost NRR. Use this fixture to rest Pradhan for an over or two and give depth players exposure.
counter_strategy.matchup_recommendations: Bat big (aim for 120+) and bowl them out cheaply. This is a NRR-boosting opportunity ahead of any potential playoffs.
